name: Tightrope
flavor: The precision discipline: a performer who has spent so long balanced on a single strand of wire high above the crowd that solid ground feels generous, and every strike lands exactly where it was always going to.

features.name: Perfect Balance
features.description: You ignore the effects of narrow, unstable, or slippery surfaces: you can move across a tightrope, ledge, ice, rubble, or similar footing at your full speed, without needing an ability check, and you don't fall from such a surface. Additionally, you have advantage on saving throws and ability checks made to avoid being knocked prone or moved against your will.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. Whenever you score a critical hit, you regain 1 Momentum (no more than once per turn, and never above your current cap).
